jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Craftsvilla - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Craftsvilla invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Craftsvilla:
Craftsvilla is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Craftsvilla!
